summary: Verified fix in /app/frontend/src/lib/voiceCommands.js:851 (r.pat.test(t) instead of navT). Ran the same 8 tests from iteration_41 end-to-end via Playwright against the live preview URL. All 8/8 passed: 6 positive nav phrases now correctly change the URL, and 2 regressions (bare 'payments', and 'this is a loan from Kevin Peterson') correctly do NOT navigate.
critical_code_review_comments: voiceCommands.js is 878 lines — consider splitting NAV_ROUTES, CREATE_INTENT_RE, and the resolver into separate modules for maintainability.

The NAV_PREFIX/navT variables (lines 835-836) are now only used for the 'reports/financials' bare-word case; the leftover code and its comment could be cleaned up or the reports catch-all could be folded into NAV_ROUTES for consistency.
test_credentials: pro@axiom.ai / pro123, companyId ca0f7fe2-32d6-422b-8272-2fff7f51dbaa (138 LLC — active company after login was Bright Beans Coffee Co., but /accounting/transactions?companyId=... worked directly).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fix in voiceCommands.js line 851 (r.pat.test(t)) is confirmed working. Positive tests results: invoices -> /invoices PASS, bills -> /bills PASS, dashboard -> /dashboard PASS, payments -> /payments PASS, receipts -> /receipts PASS, chart of accounts -> /accounting/chart-of-accounts PASS. Regression tests: bare word 'payments' stayed on transactions PASS, 'this is a loan from Kevin Peterson' stayed on transactions PASS. Note: AI panel closes after navigation, so any future test must re-open via [data-testid="ai-panel-toggle"] and wait for [data-testid="ai-panel-input"] visible before typing.
rca of the issue: Original bug (iteration_41): line 846 tested `r.pat.test(navT)`. `navT` had the leading verb stripped by NAV_PREFIX, but NAV_ROUTES regexes still expected the verb → no match. Fix: test the raw utterance `t` (which retains the verb). Confirmed 8/8 tests pass.
